description: Create a dramatic volumetric lighting scene ('god rays') in Blender. Position a Spot Light (Z > 4, Power 500W+) aimed at the cube and configure a volumetric fog domain using a Principled Volume shader (Density 0.05-0.2). Ensure the Sun light is disabled, the World Background is near black (RGB < 0.1), and the Cycles render engine is used. Render the final image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/volumetric_render.png and save the .blend file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/volumetric_scene.blend.
